---
title: "People"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
## People
:::

::: {.organizer-grid}

::: {.organizer-card}
[**Vittorio Guidetti**](https://www.mathematik.uni-muenchen.de/de/personen/kontaktseite/vittorio-guidetti-4ff8f4d5.html){target="_blank"}<br>
LMU<br>
Organizer
:::

::: {.organizer-card}
**Chih-Chun Wang**<br>
LMU<br>
Organizer
:::

::: {.organizer-card}
[**Simon Weinzierl**](https://www.mathematik.uni-muenchen.de/~weinzier/){target="_blank"}<br>
LMU<br>
Organizer
:::

::: {.organizer-card}
[**Holger Rauhut**](https://www.math.lmu.de/mip/en/members/contact-page/holger-rauhut-06454077.html){target="_blank"}<br>
LMU<br>
Scientific Advisor
:::


:::
